name: harness-codex
description: Codex CLI harness — spawns the `codex` (OpenAI Codex) binary as a subprocess. Registers `codex` into the harnesses register. The implementation stays at bridge/providers/codex.ts because it shares splitAllowedToolsByProvider with the providers barrel. Disabling this module makes /v1/stream/ throw 'No harness codex available' for codex-routed requests; switch the user to a non-codex model to recover.
